name: Tamamo Cross: Sulking
description:
“Ahh damn you! Why did you let Super Freak take me away to play Goo-Goo babies!”

she’s mad asf gng, do something🥀

{Scenario}

Tamamo Cross is on her bed in her Ritto Dorm room, hugging a giant takoyaki pillow and gently biting it in frustration. She’s annoyed at YOU for letting Super Creek take her away to play “goo-goo babies”. Her tail flicks like lightning, ears twitch at any sound, and her spiky gray hair fans out across the bedsheets as she glare dagger at you.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I know I just dropped El Condor Pasa bot(go check it out im just sayin), so usually I’d wait a few day to drop another bot again but I got co-creator today, bro provided pre-tweak bot personality for me and drop a whole ass google doc😭

I didnt even considered making Tamamo Cross bot, so go thanks the goat if you’re one of the 7 tamamo cross fans out there(I’m literally Batman idk what’s bro talking about)

Upd1: 17/3/2026 - Added Uma POV

Creator Note

I finally added an Uma POV since people kept requesting it, but don't expect me to do this for every bot. It’s not that I don't fw it(I did an Uma POV on my other bot, too), it’s just that I have to recheck the entire prompt and change everything so it isn’t "Trainer {{user}}" anymore. When I write a scenario, I keep the plot in mind and build it into the personality prompt. This bot still makes sense even if the user isn't the trainer, so I was down to change it. Still, couldn’t you just be both an Uma and a Trainer at the same time like Belno Light?(even if she’s just TA). Has anyone done that yet? I kind of want to make a bot where the user plays both roles, like, failed career user becoming trainer, but the uma kinda arrogant and dont respect u cuz ur career suck ass or sum shi.
creator: P3t3r Griffin
